---
title: "rjmcmc"
output: html_document
---


# Model

$$\begin{align}
y_{ij} | m_j, \boldsymbol{z}_i, \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)} &\sim \text{Bernoulli}\left(\theta_{ij}\right) \\
\boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)} &\sim \mathcal{TN}\left(\boldsymbol{\mu}^{(m_j)}, \sigma^2 I, \boldsymbol{l}^{(m_j)}, \boldsymbol{u}^{(m_j)}\right) \\
\boldsymbol{z}_i \mid \boldsymbol{p} &\sim \text{Multinomial}\left(1, \boldsymbol{p}\right) \\
\boldsymbol{p} &\sim \text{Dirichlet}\left(\boldsymbol{\delta}\right) \\
m &\sim \text{Categorical}\left(\boldsymbol{\pi}\right)
\end{align}$$

# Functions

$$\begin{align}
\theta_{ij} &= \prod_{c} \left[\frac{\exp \left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)}\boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}{1+\exp \left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)}\boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}\right]^{z_{ic}} \\
\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} &= f^{(m_j)}\left(\boldsymbol{q}_j, \boldsymbol{\alpha}_c\right) \\
\end{align}$$

# Likelihood

$$\begin{align}
\mathcal{L}
&= \prod_i \prod_j \left(\theta_{ij}\right)^{y_{ij}} \left(1-\theta_{ij}\right)^{1-y_{ij}} \\
&= \prod_i \prod_j
\left[
\frac{\exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
{1+\exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{y_{ij}}
\left[
\frac{1}{1+\exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{1-y_{ij}} \\
&= \prod_i \prod_j
\frac{1}{2}
\int_0^\infty
\exp\left\{
\kappa_{ij} \sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}
- \frac{\omega_{ij}}{2}
\left(
\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}
\right)^2
\right\}
\, p(\omega_{ij}) \, d\omega_{ij}
\end{align}$$

# Log-Likelihood

$$\begin{align}
\log \mathcal{L}
&= \sum_i \sum_j \Bigg[
y_{ij} \sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}
- \log\left(
1 + \exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}
\right)
\Bigg]
\end{align}$$

# Full Conditional for $\beta_j^{(m_j)}$

$$\begin{align}
\boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)} \mid \cdot
\sim
\mathcal{TN}\left(
\boldsymbol{\mu}_j^\ast,\;
\boldsymbol{\Sigma}_j,\;
\boldsymbol{l}^{(m_j)},\;
\boldsymbol{u}^{(m_j)}
\right)
\end{align}$$

$$\begin{align}
\boldsymbol{\Sigma}_j
&=
\left(
\tilde{A}_j^\top \Omega_j \tilde{A}_j + \frac{1}{\sigma^2} I
\right)^{-1} \\
\boldsymbol{\mu}_j^\ast
&=
\boldsymbol{\Sigma}_j
\left(
\tilde{A}_j^\top \boldsymbol{\kappa}_j + \frac{1}{\sigma^2} \boldsymbol{\mu}^{(m_j)}
\right) \\
\tilde{\boldsymbol{a}}_{ij}
&= \sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \\
\tilde{A}_j
&=
\begin{bmatrix}
\tilde{\boldsymbol{a}}_{1j} \\
\vdots \\
\tilde{\boldsymbol{a}}_{nj}
\end{bmatrix} \\
\Omega_j
&= \mathrm{diag}(\omega_{1j}, \dots, \omega_{nj}) \\
\boldsymbol{\kappa}_j
&=
\begin{bmatrix}
y_{1j} - \tfrac{1}{2} \\
\vdots \\
y_{nj} - \tfrac{1}{2}
\end{bmatrix},
\quad
\omega_{ij} \sim \mathrm{PG}(1,0)
\end{align}$$

# Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{p}$

$$\begin{align}
\boldsymbol{p} \mid \cdot
\sim
\text{Dirichlet}\left(
\delta_1 + n_1,\;
\delta_2 + n_2,\;
\ldots,\;
\delta_C + n_C
\right)
\end{align}$$

$$\begin{align}
n_c &= \sum_{i} z_{ic}, \quad c = 1,\ldots,C
\end{align}$$

# Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{z}_i$

$$\begin{align}
p(z_{ic} = 1 \mid \cdot)
&\propto
p_c \;
\prod_{j}
\left[
\frac{\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
{1+\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{y_{ij}}
\left[
\frac{1}{1+\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{1-y_{ij}}
\end{align}$$

$$\begin{align}
p(z_{ic} = 1 \mid \cdot)
&=
\frac{
p_c \;
\prod_{j}
\left[
\frac{\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
{1+\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{y_{ij}}
\left[
\frac{1}{1+\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{1-y_{ij}}
}{
\sum_{c'=1}^C
p_{c'} \;
\prod_{j}
\left[
\frac{\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{c'j}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
{1+\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{c'j}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{y_{ij}}
\left[
\frac{1}{1+\exp\left\{\boldsymbol{a}_{c'j}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}\right\}}
\right]^{1-y_{ij}}
}
\end{align}$$

# Full Conditional for $\omega_{ij}$

$$\begin{align}
\omega_{ij} \mid \cdot
\sim
\mathrm{PG}\left(
1,\;
\sum_{c} z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}
\right)
\end{align}$$

$$\begin{align}
\psi_{ij}
&=
\sum_{c} z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m_j)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m_j)}
\end{align}$$

# Full Conditional for $m_j$

$$\begin{align}
p(m_j = m \mid \cdot)
&\propto
\pi_m \;
p\!\left(\boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m)} \mid m_j = m\right)
\prod_i
\left[
\frac{\exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m)}\right\}}
{1+\exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m)}\right\}}
\right]^{y_{ij}}
\left[
\frac{1}{1+\exp\left\{\sum_c z_{ic}\,\boldsymbol{a}_{cj}^{(m)} \boldsymbol{\beta}_j^{(m)}\right\}}
\right]^{1-y_{ij}}
\end{align}$$
